message:
fix(reactor): RAII FdRestoreGuard for poller fd manipulation in tests

Both epoll and kqueue reactor tests that temporarily close and restore
the poller fd now use a FdRestoreGuard struct that automatically restores
the original fd via dup2 on drop. This prevents fd leaks and dangling
poller state if a test panics between the close and the manual restore.

The guard's restore() method returns both the dup2 result and the
close(saved_fd) result, allowing tests to assert on both operations.
The Drop implementation silently attempts restoration if restore() was
never called (panic path), preventing cascading failures in other tests
that share the process fd table.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
